title: Friendly Forest Friends
description: A simple forest animal coloring page featuring adorable woodland creatures in their natural habitat. This activity helps children learn about forest animals while developing fine motor skills.
instructions: Color the forest animals using crayons, colored pencils, or markers. Try to use colors that match what these animals look like in real life!

content.image: A forest scene with simple outlines of a fox, owl, squirrel, deer, and rabbit. The animals are surrounded by trees, mushrooms, and a small stream.
learningFacts: Foxes have bushy tails that help them stay balanced when running
Owls can turn their heads almost all the way around to see behind them
Squirrels collect and store nuts for the winter months
Male deer grow new antlers every year
Rabbits have powerful back legs for jumping away from danger
